mapper.insert: insert into tbl_rag_document (file_id, document_name, document_status, rag_status, uploaded_by, last_error) values (#{fileId}, #{documentName}, #{documentStatus}, #{ragStatus}, #{uploadedBy}, #{lastError})
mapper.update: update tbl_rag_document set rag_status = #{ragStatus}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
